case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. GEORGINA CENTENO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-17-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: .S VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
